message:
fix(io,iter,ndarray,ufunc): replace panicking unwrap/as-casts with fallible conversions across 4 crates

io: Replaces 3 write!().unwrap() calls in savetxt formatting with .map_err()
returning IOError::WriteContractViolation, preventing panics on write failures.

iter: Fixes select_transfer_class to use the already-computed item_size local
variable instead of re-casting input.item_size, avoiding a redundant conversion.

ndarray: Replaces 3 bare `(dim - 1) as isize` casts with
isize::try_from(dim - 1).map_err() in required_view_nbytes, is_c_contiguous,
and is_f_contiguous, preventing silent truncation on 32-bit targets when
dimensions exceed isize::MAX.

ufunc: Same isize::try_from pattern applied to 2 contiguity checks in
UFuncArrayView, plus replaces a panicking .expect() in
mediate_ufunc_runtime_policy with .ok_or_else() returning a typed UFuncError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
